themes: AI quality gaps (Gemini harness vs. model)

worthClicking.author: @minchoi
worthClicking.why: Anthropic killing access for 60+ employees overnight with no explanation is a concrete, documented vendor lock-in horror story that directly validates the AI product trust risk operators need to understand.

worthClicking.author: @rauchg
worthClicking.why: Vercel CEO's direct incident post naming Context.ai as the breach vector — important for any builder with AI tooling in their supply chain to know what actually happened.

worthClicking.author: @theo
worthClicking.why: Best early technical breakdown of the Vercel breach with actionable triage: which env vars are at risk, roll them now.

worthClicking.author: @garrytan
worthClicking.why: Garry shipping a BullMQ-backed jobs server for OpenClaw sub-agents is a real infrastructure solution to the agent timeout problem that's been causing production pain.

worthClicking.author: @shcallaway
worthClicking.why: Contrarian take on parallel agents — one or two focused agents beats a swarm of low-quality PRs — worth the read before you scale your agent setup.

worthClicking.author: @andrewchen
worthClicking.why: Crisp framing of the token-as-capital thesis: what startups raise for has shifted from devs → clicks → GPUs → tokens, useful for AI product strategy decks.

worthClicking.author: @emollick
worthClicking.why: The Gemini model vs. Gemini product gap is a concrete product strategy lesson about why capability without tooling harness loses to competitors who ship the full loop.

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: NSA quietly using Claude Mythos despite labeling Anthropic a 'supply chain risk' is a real government procurement signal worth tracking.

voices.why: Actively shipping open-source agent infrastructure (GBrain, GStack) and narrating his own OpenClaw production learnings in real time.
Fast, credible incident reporting on developer infrastructure events like Vercel — good signal filter for build-vs-buy risk.
Consistently surfaces the product-capability gap in AI tools, relevant for anyone building on top of foundation models.
Practitioner perspective on agentic workflows with contrarian takes grounded in actual usage rather than hype.

examples: Elon engagement bait (one-word posts, SpaceX cheerleading)
geopolitical/military news (Strait of Hormuz, USCIS divisions)
celebrity/sports posts (Cristiano, Obama tributes, Mets jokes)

emerging.theme: AI quality gaps (Gemini harness vs. model)
